_wai_bootstrap._purpose: Instructions for AI assistants working with this hub

check_order: 2. Check if 'WAI' command is in PATH
find_framework.if_not_found: Ask user: 'Where is your Wheelwright framework? (git clone https://github.com/wheelwright-ai/framework)'

hub_config._note: framework_path: Set during 'WAI hub create' to point to wheelwright framework location

learning_philosophy.description: Only share high-impact learnings (impact >= 8) to keep signals valuable. Quality over quantity.

wheel_contributions.description: Wheels can update this section to improve hub intelligence

_instructions.for_llms: Read this file to understand the developer you're working with. Use these preferences when making suggestions. Don't override explicit project requirements, but default to these patterns.
_instructions.updating: This file is created during 'WAI hub create'. Update manually or via wheel signals.
